response.justification: The candidate is a strong generalist engineer with deep full-stack, TypeScript/Node.js, and DLang experience, but the role requires 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows plus capital-markets or fixed-income domain expertise. Their only substantive C++ work was an early-career role on NI LabWindows/CVI, they list no SQL Server or Oracle experience, and their sole finance exposure was a Node.js-based investment product, not capital markets or fixed income. The core mandatory requirements are not met.
strengths: Solid engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, and trunk-based development experience
Low-latency and high-throughput systems work (millions of HTTP requests/sec, async I/O, caching)
Broad technical range across backend, embedded, and desktop, with strong communication skills evidenced by workshops and talks
concerns: C++ experience is limited to one early-career role, far short of the required 5-10 years on Windows
No fixed-income, derivatives, or capital-markets domain experience
No SQL Server or Oracle background; databases listed are MySQL and MongoDB

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering and performance background
